rationale: In the citing paper, Jedidi and Kohli (2005) is cited only as part of broad grouped references to prior work on information usage and subset/variable selection, plus one general managerial-motivation mention. The text does not give this specific paper a distinct conceptual or methodological role in the IAM model development, estimation, or empirical tests. There is no direct extension, refinement, challenge, or application of the cited paper's specific subset-conjunctive framework in the citing paper's core contribution.
